items.label: BREAKING
items.title: Tim Cook is stepping down as CEO of Apple. Here's a look at his 15-year legacy, from new products and services to China expansion.
items.reason: Apple leadership change immediately impacts tech market and company strategy.
items.telegramHtml: 🚨 BREAKING [9/10] — 6:25 PM ET Tim Cook is stepping down as CEO of Apple.
